## What We Were Doing
- Task: Restructure content to match CMU 17-445 professional format, improve visual design, add navigation
- Progress:
  - [x] Overview restructured: course description → who it's for → topics → examples → project → learning outcomes → schedule → assessment → logistics → syllabus & policies

## Decisions
- Blue accent color (#2563eb) chosen for professional/academic feel — softer than black, references CMU's color palette
- Overview structure mirrors CMU 17-445: course description → who it's for → topics → examples → project → learning outcomes
- Syllabus placeholders (grading, participation, diversity, accommodations) left for instructor to fill in
- Navigation is a true cycle (Overview ↔ L1 ↔ L2 ↔ L3 ↔ L4 ↔ L5 ↔ Scale ↔ Overview) with both arrows on every page
- Accent-colored text via `<span class="accent">` — used sparingly for the 2-3 most impactful lines per section
- Scale page positioned as "bridge from course experience to industry" rather than just a tool comparison table
